title: neottianthe cucullata var. calcicola
intro: Neottianthe cucullata var. calcicola is a rare and endemic variety of orchid found in the mountainous regions of Taiwan, specifically on calcareous soil. This plant is known for its unique characteristics and potential medicinal properties, which have been studied for their antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Neottianthe cucullata var. calcicola include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress, making it a promising herbal remedy for various health conditions. However, the preparation of Neottianthe cucullata var. calcicola as a medicinal herb is not widely established, and further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
